title: Inworld API降价约50%，LLM/TTS/STT全线半价
full_text:
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
🚨 AI News | TestingCatalog
@testingcatalog
Inworld has cut prices across its Realtime Inference and Speech-to-Text services, repricing the open models it serves so consumer voice apps can run at scale more cheaply and for longer.
With Realtime Inference, Speech-to-Text with voice profiling, and a Realtime API that now and MiniMax at around half the public rate behind a single OpenAI-compatible endpoint.
Inworld AI
@inworld_ai
9h
We want to make AI accessible for everyone, so we're reducing our API prices by ~50%.
Consumer AI growth is still blocked by model costs. 97% of consumer AI users will never pay. But every session still consumes tokens.
This is the math we've found every consumer AI Show more
00:00
Paid partnership
4:34 PM · Jun 10, 2026 8.2K Views
